narrative:
Milford Center (precinct in Union County) has 519 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.9 percentage points.
